scripts.evm:deploy: cd evm && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast --private-key 0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 --ffi
scripts.evm:deploy:intent: cd evm && forge script script/DeployIntent.s.sol --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast --private-key 0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 --ffi --disable-code-size-limit
scripts.evm:deploy:mocks: cd evm && forge script script/DeployMocks.s.sol --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast --private-key 0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 --ffi
scripts.evm:deploy:base-sepolia: source .env.production && cd evm && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $EVM_RPC_URL --broadcast --private-key $EVM_PRIVATE_KEY --ffi
scripts.evm:deploy:intent:base-sepolia: source .env.production && cd evm && forge script script/DeployIntent.s.sol --rpc-url $EVM_RPC_URL --broadcast --private-key $EVM_PRIVATE_KEY --ffi
scripts.noir:build: cd circuits/intent && $HOME/.nargo/bin/nargo compile && bb write_vk -b target/intent.json -o target/vk -t evm && bb write_solidity_verifier -k target/vk/vk -o ../../evm/src/IntentVerifier.sol -t evm
